title: Vibrant Crisp Spanish Egg White Hash
description: A lazy-sunday Spanish hash featuring crisp potatoes, fluffy egg whites, and a bright citrus kiss.
instructions: Preheat the dolsot over medium-high heat.
Toss the diced potatoes with 1 tbsp oil, paprika, salt, pepper, and lemon zest in a bowl.
Add the potatoes to the dolsot and cook for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they start to brown.
Pour the remaining tablespoon of oil over the potatoes, reduce heat to medium, and continue cooking until the potatoes are crispy and golden, about 6 minutes.
Whisk the egg whites until soft peaks form, then gently pour them over the potatoes in a circular motion.
Cover the dolsot with its lid and steam the egg whites for 3 minutes until the top is firm.
Remove the lid, stir gently to combine the crispy potatoes with the set egg whites, and sprinkle chopped parsley over the top.
Serve hot straight from the dolsot, optionally adding a lemon wedge for extra brightness.
